title: run --amend counterfactual
manager: Counterfactual replay — `run --amend val=v` or `--amend-input step=N` forks a recorded run with one thing changed, and hands both to `diff` for a first-divergence report. This is "what if" debugging: change one input or value in a real run and see exactly where and how the outcome diverges, which is how you test a hypothesis about a bug without having to reproduce the whole scenario live and hope it happens again.
cs: `run --amend val=v` / `--amend-input step=N` forks a recorded run; handed to `diff` for a first-divergence report; counterfactual debugging over replay.
